name: ai-visibility-analyzer
description: Business-focused AI visibility scoring SaaS platform.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @aiva/core && concurrently "npm run dev -w @aiva/api" "npm run dev -w @aiva/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @aiva/core && npm run build -w @aiva/api && npm run build -w @aiva/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @aiva/core && npm run typecheck -w @aiva/api && npm run typecheck -w @aiva/web
